disabled_reason: 2026-07-09 review: live LaunchAgent was applying AI recommendations from stale analyzer_log-based advisor. Keep scheduled job harmless until state/history/log audit and allowlist policy are reviewed.

audit_reconciliation.history_policy: tunable_params_history.jsonl is append-only audit history; do not rewrite old ai_auto rows.
audit_reconciliation.decision: Use current tunable_params.json values as canonical after 2026-07-09 settings review.

reconciled_history_mismatches.reason: Current runtime config remains canonical; min_action_jpy was not the primary scarcity driver and auto_tune is disabled.
Current runtime config remains canonical; VIX emergency threshold should be reviewed manually, not inherited from stale ai_auto history.

last_changes.rationale: [Auto Mode] レジームA_強気・VIX17台で攻撃局面。小ロット排除を強化し大型エントリーに集中。現在値250000から引き上げ。 | regime=A_強気
[Auto Mode] Cash比率32.6%がトリガー閾値40%に近づいているが未達。強気局面でキャッシュドラッグ解消を促進するため閾値を35%に引き下げ、早期リバランス検討を促す。 | regime=A_強気
[Auto Mode] 現金比率3.8%は低水準だが、top_sector=Cashが32.6%と高い。キャッシュドラッグ警告をより早期に発動させるため30%から25%に引き下げ、積極的な資金投入を促す。 | regime=A_強気
[Auto Mode] 強気局面で機会捕捉を優先。ニューススコア閾値を20から15に引き下げ、より多くの銘柄シグナルを拾いエントリー機会を拡大する。 | regime=A_強気
